docs.title: MCP Server
docs.body: The MCP server is the only write path into Canopy. Coding agents connect over the Model Context Protocol and post session output through a typed contract. Every request carries a bearer token, compared in constant time. Token rotation is tracked in #142.

versions.body: The MCP server is the only write path into Canopy. Coding agents connect over the Model Context Protocol and post session output through a typed contract. Every request carries a bearer token, compared in constant time. Token rotation is tracked in #142.
The MCP server is the only write path. Tokens are compared in constant time. Rotation: revoke and re-mint from Settings.

docs.title: Product Overview
docs.body: Canopy is the shared source of truth and working memory for Sapling, a four-person software team.

versions.body: Canopy is the shared source of truth and working memory for Sapling, a four-person software team.

docs.title: ADR-001 · Postgres for the store
docs.body: Use a single Postgres instance as the store. Sections, versions, feed entries, and decisions are all rows.

versions.body: Use a single Postgres instance as the store. Sections, versions, feed entries, and decisions are all rows.
